zh.Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston於1385年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓時，他的父親Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston31歲，母親Elizabeth de Loundres28歲。他於大約1424年與Jane D'Artois在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1441年在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達納阿斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston于1385年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓时，他的父亲Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston31岁，母亲Elizabeth de Loundres28岁。他于大约1424年与Jane D'Artois在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1441年在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達納阿斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston was born in 1385, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth de Loundres, was 28. He married Jane D'Artois about 1424, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1441, in Naas, County Kildare, Ireland, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston est né en 1385, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Loundres, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Jane D'Artois environ 1424, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1441, à Naas, County Kildare, Irlande, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston 1385 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Loundres 28. Er hat um 1424 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland Jane D'Artois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1441 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Naas, County Kildare, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston è nato il nel 1385 nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Loundres, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Jane D'Artois circa 1424, nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1441, nel Naas, County Kildare, Irlanda, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Naas, County Kildare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ キルダアナアス
ja.Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストン
ja.Kelles, Ossory,Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーカランケルズ
ja.Gormanston Castle, Meath, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストン
ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanstonが1385年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanstonは31歳，母Elizabeth de Loundresは28歳であった。約1424年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンでJane D'Artoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1441年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアナアスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston(이)가 1385년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Loundres(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1424년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 Jane D'Artois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1441년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 나아스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston nasceu em 1385, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Loundres, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane D'Artois aproximadamente 1424, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1441, em Naas, County Kildare, Irlanda, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston родился в 1385 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Loundres, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane D'Artois около 1424 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1441 г. в местности наас, коунти каилдар, Ирландия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston nació en 1385, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Loundres, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Jane D'Artois aproximadamente 1424, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1441, en Naas, County Kildare, Irlanda, a la edad de 57 años.
